prompt: A minimalist editorial illustration about cross-strait relations and dialogue, in a muted flat-paper collage style with soft grain texture and rounded shapes. Show 2 human figures seated across a table in profile, facing each other: on the left a man in dark desaturated blue, resting his chin on one hand in a thoughtful pose; on the right a woman in warm brown, gesturing with one hand as if explaining. Both faces are intentionally anonymized with soft blurred rectangular blocks over the facial area. Centered between them is a dark blue balance scale, upright and symmetrical, symbolizing justice, negotiation, and equilibrium. Above the figures are 2 overlapping speech bubbles, one blue-gray on the left and one pale beige on the right, indicating conversation and contested viewpoints. At the bottom center, place 1 white silhouette of a human head in side profile containing a simple growing plant with stem and leaves, symbolizing peace, understanding, or constructive thinking. Use a cream background with 4 large translucent abstract circular forms around the composition, including a pale gray shape on the far left, a beige shape behind the upper center-right, a warm tan shape on the far right, and a darker blue-gray semicircular shape along the bottom foreground. Keep the composition balanced, calm, symbolic, and poster-like, with no text, no sharp outlines, no photorealism, and a subdued palette of dusty blue, slate, beige, cream, and brown.
